subtopics.title: Components
subtopics.content:
- **33 cards** in 3 suits (Bells, Keys, Moons), numbered 1-11 each
- **Scoring tokens**
- **Score track**
- Odd-numbered cards (1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11) have special abilities

subtopics.title: Table Setup
subtopics.content:
1. **Shuffle all 33 cards.**
2. **Deal 13 cards** to each player.
3. **Place 1 card face up** — This determines the trump suit.
4. **Remaining 6 cards** form a draw deck.
5. **Place scoring tokens** on the score track.

subtopics.title: Player Setup
subtopics.content:
- **13 cards in hand** — The non-dealer leads the first trick.
- **Scoring tokens** on position 0.
- **Play 13 tricks** per round.

subtopics.title: Game Overview
subtopics.content: Fox in the Forest is a 2-player trick-taking game with a twist: winning too many tricks scores poorly (greed). Special card abilities add tactical depth. Score points over multiple rounds.

subtopics.title: Turn Structure
subtopics.content:
Each round consists of 13 tricks:
1. **Lead** — Leader plays any card from hand.
2. **Follow** — Other player must follow suit if able. If unable, may play any card.
3. **Determine winner** — Highest card of led suit wins unless a trump card was played (highest trump wins).
4. **Winner leads next trick.**
5. **Resolve abilities** — Odd-numbered cards trigger special effects.

subtopics.title: Key Actions
subtopics.content:
#### Card Abilities (Odd Numbers)
- **1 (Swan)** — If you play this and lose the trick, you lead the next trick.
- **3 (Fox)** — You may exchange the face-up trump card with a card from your hand.
- **5 (Woodcutter)** — Draw 1 card from the draw deck, then discard 1 card face down.
- **7 (Treasure)** — The winner of this trick scores 1 bonus point.
- **9 (Witch)** — This card acts as trump if led (regardless of suit).
- **11 (Monarch)** — You must play this if it's your only card of the led suit.

subtopics.title: Special Rules
subtopics.content:
#### Greedy / Humble Scoring
- Winning 0-3 tricks: **Humble** — 6 points.
- Winning 4 tricks: 1 point.
- Winning 5 tricks: 2 points.
- Winning 6 tricks: 3 points.
- Winning 7-9 tricks: **Victorious** — 6 points.
- Winning 10-13 tricks: **Greedy** — 0 points!

#### Trump Suit
- Determined by the face-up card. Trump beats non-trump.
- Fox (3) ability can change the trump card.

subtopics.title: Scoring and Endgame
subtopics.content:
#### Round Scoring
- Count tricks won and score based on the scoring table.
- Best range: 7-9 tricks (6 points) or exactly 0-3 tricks (6 points).

#### Game End
- First player to **21 points** wins. Play as many rounds as needed.

subtopics.title: Beginner Tips
subtopics.content:
- **Don't be greedy** — Winning 10+ tricks scores 0! Aim for 7-9.
- **Or go humble** — If you're losing, aim for 0-3 tricks for 6 points.
- **Use abilities** — The Fox (3) and Woodcutter (5) give powerful flexibility.
- **Count tricks** — Track how many each player has won.

subtopics.title: Key Strategies
subtopics.content:
- **Trick targeting** — Know your target range early and play toward it.
- **Swan (1) control** — The Swan lets you lead even after losing, giving control.
- **Trump management** — Save trump cards for key tricks.
- **Force greed** — Dump tricks on your opponent to push them past 9.
- **Witch (9) timing** — Play the Witch as a surprise trump to steal key tricks.
